goal: Repo-wide subtraction cleanup: remove dead surface, deduplicate repeated concepts, simplify overcomplicated spots, and align drifted docs — net-negative lines, no behavior change except deletions of truly dead code

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All Python sources still byte-compile cleanly after the cleanup
Behavioral gate suite (incl. the doc-count lint that pins every public gate-case count) is green
Hook fixture suite is green (stop gate, guard, sessionstart, installer idempotence)
Static intake cases still classify correctly against the example config
The repo's own gate config still validates
npm CLI unit + integration tests pass (zero-dependency Node wrapper unchanged in behavior)
Bench fixture smoke still runs end to end

constraints: Stdlib-only Python and zero-dependency Node are non-negotiable
bench/PROTOCOL.md pre-registered decision rules are untouchable
No behavior changes except deletions of truly dead code, each named and justified in its commit message
Settled decisions in CHANGELOG/ROADMAP ('Not on the roadmap, on purpose') and docs/records/ are not relitigated
If eval cases are removed or added, every doc count the lint pins is updated in the same commit
non_goals: The SKILL.md always-loaded ladder/class-text cut candidate (an operator decision staged for its own release per ROADMAP; not mechanical cleanup)
Redesigns or feature work of any kind
Touching archive/ or docs/records/ historical content
assumptions: The archive/ tree is deliberately kept as published eval history
Historical docs (improvement plans, critical reviews, review-yield memos) stay as dated records even when superseded
verification_plan: Run the full six-suite eval battery plus static cases, config check, npm tests, and bench fixture smoke after each themed commit
Re-verify every subagent-reported claim personally before landing it

validation_contract.goal: Every deletion is proven dead (no runtime caller, no doc reference, no eval dependence) before removal; every dedup is behavior-preserving; every doc fix matches the code as shipped

independent_review.notes: Round 1: request_changes (2 blocking, 1 minor, 1 informational) — resolutions in review_findings[]. Round 2 on the amended diff: approve, zero findings. Round 3 (release confirmation): approve on the v6.4.0 release diff — confirmed the only delta since round 2 is version mechanics at the four sites plus the CHANGELOG heading.

completion_record.goal: Repo-wide subtraction cleanup: remove dead surface, deduplicate repeated concepts, simplify overcomplicated spots, and align drifted docs — net-negative lines, no behavior change except deletions of truly dead code
acceptance_criteria: All Python sources still byte-compile cleanly after the cleanup
Behavioral gate suite (incl. the doc-count lint that pins every public gate-case count) is green
Hook fixture suite is green (stop gate, guard, sessionstart, installer idempotence)
Static intake cases still classify correctly against the example config
The repo's own gate config still validates
npm CLI unit + integration tests pass (zero-dependency Node wrapper unchanged in behavior)
Bench fixture smoke still runs end to end
evidence: python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py evals/*.py hosts/claude-code/*.py -> clean byte-compile, no output
python3 evals/run_evals.py -> 62/62 eval cases passed (doc-count lint green at canonical=249, addon=37, control-plane.md in watch list)
python3 evals/run_memory_evals.py -> 32/32 memory eval cases passed
python3 evals/run_reality_evals.py -> 51/51 reality eval cases passed
python3 evals/run_hook_evals.py -> 55/55 hook eval cases passed (stop_gate + sessionstart via hooklib)
python3 evals/run_routing_evals.py -> 30/30 routing eval cases passed (example config minus advisor block still schema-valid + checker-valid)
python3 evals/run_control_evals.py -> 37/37 control-plane add-on cases passed
python3 scripts/quality_loop.py eval-cases evals/cases --config assets/quality-loop.config.example.json -> 19/19 eval cases passed after redundant case 01 removed
python3 scripts/quality_loop.py check-config quality-loop.config.json -> gate-config path: config ok (schema now declares protect_harness)
python3 bench/runner.py --mode fixture --seeds 1 --out /tmp/quality-loop-fixture-smoke.json -> fixture smoke wrote summary + runs; validate-clean
completion_record.right_size_decision: rung=delete: the whole change is deletion, reuse of existing primitives, and doc pointers; net -230 lines plus a 47KB binary
risks: sessionstart_context.py missing-git edge: crash -> cwd fallback, a named and justified behavior gain aligning the shim with the documented never-crash hook contract
npm-smoke.yml gains one ubuntu-only test step (the single addition): first CI execution of the package's 33 existing tests
completion_record.rollback: git revert the branch commits (each themed commit reverts independently); no data or schema migration involved
follow_ups: cli.mjs reimplements install.py's next-steps footer with drifted wording — unify by enriching install.py's --json footer or consuming payload.footer (installer-UX decision)
an eval pinning schema<->check-config agreement for gate-config-only files (reviewer suggestion)
quality_loop_memory.py hand-rolls two git subprocess calls its own qlcore import could serve once git_capture grows timeout+OSError safety (deliberately not done here: shared gate primitive)
date-parser near-duplicate (memory [:10]-tolerant vs routing strict) and reality.py's two naive-local timestamps — behavior-adjacent, left for a contract that authorizes them
completion_record.release: v6.4.0 — the subtraction pass: version bumped at the four sites (SKILL.md frontmatter, packages/npm/package.json, README badge, hosts/github/quality-loop-example.yml pin) and the CHANGELOG Unreleased entry renamed 6.4.0

harness_update.rule: docs/control-plane.md joined the doc-count lint's watched docs list in run_evals.py, and its add-on count is stated in the lintable '37 add-on cases' phrasing
harness_update.why: The 35-vs-37 drift persisted because the lint never watched that file AND the old phrasing was invisible to its patterns; the count-drift failure class had recurred (116->121 historically), so per RETROSPECT doctrine the fix is a durable lint extension, toggle-tested failing-then-green.
harness_update.evidence: evals/run_evals.py case_doc_counts_match_canonical docs list; lint fails with '35 add-on cases' != 37 when toggled

patterns_to_follow: One truth per thing: canonical source plus pointers, never a second copy
Every guard comment cites the incident or eval that motivated it — preserve those when moving code

minimality_decision.reason: The task is subtraction by mandate: remove dead readers-without-writers, unify duplicate implementations into the existing shared module, and fix docs to match code. Deletion and reuse of existing primitives are the whole change; no new code beyond import lines and pointer sentences.

plan: Theme 1 (dead code): remove the .quality-loop/runs journal reader (_latest_run_summary and the brief Last-run section) whose writer was archived in v3.0, the unreachable ORCHESTRATE entry in STRONG_REASONING_STEPS, the redundant inline git_capture import in record_outcome, and any census-confirmed dead helpers in scripts/ and evals/

Theme 2 (dedup): stop_gate.py and sessionstart_context.py adopt hooklib.json_input/project_root instead of their verbatim private copies; census-confirmed duplicate helpers collapse into quality_loop_core

Theme 3 (docs drift): fix doc statements the code contradicts — docs/architecture.md protect-harness sentence and fictional record example, docs/control-plane.md stale 35-case count (reword to the lintable '37 add-on cases' phrasing and add the file to the doc-count lint list in run_evals.py as the durable harness change), references/tool-contracts.md lint omission and guard-key note, references/agentic-orchestration.md canonical-pointer contradiction, examples/claude-code/CLAUDE.md legacy config path; replace docs/architecture.md's restated role table with a pointer; delete the orphaned examples/claude-code/memory-hooks.md and the never-displayed docs/images/terminal-demo-poster.png plus its generator lines in docs/images/src/terminal_demo.py; add the missing case-20 row to evals/README.md; drop the retired advisor block from assets/quality-loop.config.example.json and mark it legacy in assets/quality-loop.config.schema.json while adding the real protect_harness and enforcement root keys the schema omits
Theme 4 (structure nits): install.py dead condition on args.host, one-caller wrappers inlined where they read better

Each theme is its own commit; full battery (run_evals, run_memory_evals, run_reality_evals, run_hook_evals, run_routing_evals, run_control_evals, eval-cases, check-config, npm node --test, bench fixture) after each

commands_run.evidence: 62/62 eval cases passed (doc-count lint green at canonical=249, addon=37, control-plane.md in watch list)
55/55 hook eval cases passed (stop_gate + sessionstart via hooklib)
30/30 routing eval cases passed (example config minus advisor block still schema-valid + checker-valid)
19/19 eval cases passed after redundant case 01 removed
gate-config path: config ok (schema now declares protect_harness)
fixture smoke wrote summary + runs; validate-clean

review_findings.text: SessionStart dedup changes missing-git behavior (crash -> cwd fallback), read as violating the no-behavior-change constraint
review_findings.resolution: Kept with rationale, not reverted: the contract authorizes deletions whose behavior delta is named and justified (it is, in the commit message and CHANGELOG), and the prior crash violated the hook shims' documented never-crash contract; the divergence was the drift the dedup existed to fix.

review_findings.text: quality-loop.config.json declared a $schema it does not satisfy and claimed check-config reports missing orchestration sections (stale since the v6.3.0 gate-config-only path)
review_findings.resolution: Fixed in 0b0dfad: description now states the gate-config-only behavior; the false $schema pointer dropped. Follow-up noted: an eval pinning schema<->check-config agreement.

review_findings.text: brief --help still advertised 'last run' after the run-journal deletion
review_findings.resolution: Fixed in 0b0dfad: help now reads (last record, risks, lessons, progress).

review_findings.text: Read-only review sandbox limited independent re-runs (TemporaryDirectory/pyc//tmp writes, 16 Node fs tests EPERM); check-config + 17 Node tests + in-memory compile of all 18 py files passed there
review_findings.resolution: Documented sandbox reality (hosts/codex/README.md); the full battery re-runs in CI, which is the anchor.

next_action: Open the PR; maintainer sign-off gates the merge
